tool_input.command: cat processing-pattern/web-application/web-application-feature-details.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); sections=[s for s in d['sections'] if s['id'] in ['s16']]; [print(s['id'], s['title'], '\n', s['content']) for s in sections]"

python3 -c "
import json
with open('processing-pattern/web-application/web-application-feature-details.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
for s in d['sections']:
    if s['id'] == 's16':
        print(s['id'], s['title'])
        print(s['content'])
"
